AC-1.description: Finding with score >= 0.4 included in report

AC-3.evidence: LLM prompt includes clickbait detection with 0.3 penalty

AC-4.description: Quality score visible in debug mode
AC-4.evidence: qualityScore field exists in Finding type and passed to synthesis

AC-5.description: Only quality findings included when 100 findings processed
AC-5.evidence: Quality filtering happens before capping in execution flow

AC-6.evidence: QUALITY_CONFIG exported with minQualityScore, used in actions

implementation_summary: Created configurable quality threshold system with QUALITY_CONFIG. Updated scoreFindingsQuality to use QUALITY_CONFIG.minQualityScore instead of hardcoded 0.4. Added clickbait detection to LLM scoring prompt. Quality filtering now happens before capping, ensuring only high-quality findings are included in reports.
